ShortDescription.Value: Show/Hide notification alert icons, add/remove Money, view Money, set Milestones.

Publish.LongDescription:
- City Watchdog helps reduce city alert icon clutter and adds convenient city setup tools. - It's modeled on the original City Controller mod (retired) - Many expanded features and future plans.
### Features
- Show or hide notification alert icons. - Change the milestone you start with (Trains now! Yes you can!).
#### Money - Manual add/subtract money with hotkeys ([ or ]). - Automatic add money option (manual is recommended over auto). - Money view for toolbar values. - Convert saves from Unlimited money type to normal Limited money.
Hotkeys - Shift+N = open/close panel (same as clicking on Top Left icon). - N = toggle all notification icons on/off (same as clicking on Toggle All * star button) - [ = Add Money - ] = Subtract Money
### Important Notes - City Watchdog hides/shows alert icons; it does not fix the problem behind the icons. Good for reducing stress or screenshots. - Make a backup before converting an Unlimited Money save. Mod cannot undo that conversion. - City Watchdog is a heavily rewritten redux/expansion of City Controller. It is not just a copy-paste release and nearly a whole rewrite. I hope you enjoy the new features, better performance, and safety guards! - CWD's Money View is a ground-up code write of similar money info to Show Text Trends (retired). MV uses new methods to implement vanilla CS2 component extensions, customizable new money layouts, settings options, and translations.
### Support and feedback Feedback is welcome through GitHub or Discord links on the right. If you like free mods, give a Like, easy way to show support :)
### Future - 9 languages supported now, more needed! - If anyone can make better Thumbnail and screenshots, please let me know.
### Credits - River Mochi - author/maintainer - Thanks to Mbyron26 for orig. City Controller mod. - Money View inspired by earlier mods by DanielNZ Show Text - Dorkington - tester/feature suggestion - Flightech, SonNathan - testers - Thumbnail photograph by Maryia Shedava at Mont Saint-Michel in Normandy, France https://unsplash.com/photos/a-dog-poses-in-front-of-a-distant-castle-bEpjaU_CTcM
Publish.ChangeLog: - international format money view - update images, instructions - internal cleanup: simplify, organize.
